title: Iliad, Book 19: The Reconciliation
description: Book 19 of Homer's Iliad: The Reconciliation.
introduction: Book 19 of the Iliad: The Reconciliation. The Greek text is from the Venetus A manuscript (10th century), the oldest complete manuscript of the Iliad.

translation.original_text: Ἠὼς μὲν κροκόπεπλος ἀπ᾿ Ὠκεανοῖο ῥοάων ὄρνυθ᾿.
translation.text: Dawn rose from the streams of Ocean. Thetis brought the divine armor. Achilles called the assembly and renounced his wrath. Agamemnon offered the gifts and returned Briseis. But Achilles cared nothing for gifts. He wanted only to fight.
